patch_rationale: Mark agentmail-fd-pressure-probe.sh as intentionally on-demand audit diagnostic; removes false-positive flag from gap-hunt-probe probe-without-receiver detector. Filed for flywheel-tvd9q (P2 CLOSED, verdict=benign_no_action). Probe is kept as on-demand diagnostic via --doctor mode; no continuous-monitor schedule exists or is needed.
design_note: where field is STRING (single path), not list — gap-hunt-probe's _expand_registry_path() expects str via _walk_for_validator_paths() walker. Bundles with multiple paths use components[].where pattern instead.
